## Devops project Pull Request

### Summary
- What did you change?

### Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

### Validation
- [ ] `cd server && npm test`
- [ ] `cd client && npm run build`
- [ ] `docker compose up --build`

### Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/*`, `fix/*`, or `chore/*`
- [ ] Linked to an issue
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
